post.content:
I have gone through five rounds of interview:
Round 1: DS Problem solving - Bus Routes - Available on Leetcode
Round 2: HLD - Send notifications to all the subscribers who have added a particular stock in their watchlist if the stock prices fluctuates by 5%.
Round 3: LLD - Allocate a meeting room for given start time, end time and list of participants.
Round 4: Bar Raiser/Focus on your Projects/Resume
Round 5: Hiring Manager Round - Again focus will be on the work you have done.
Are you sure that this is for L5B because there must be two HLD rounds for Staff role?. What\'s the verdict?
Quick question - how did you get the interview? Did you apply online or recruiter reached out?
Hey, do you mind sharing some resources which helped you learn ?\n\nHow many years of experience do you have ?
Please share the resources as well\nAnd it willl be very helpful if you give the Linkedin Profile of the HR who hired you.
